endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Devices/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Devices REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get all the provisioning services in a subscription.
endpoints.description: Get all the provisioning services in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices
endpoints.description: Get a list of all provisioning services in the given resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get the non-security related metadata of the provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Get the non-security related metadata of the provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: Create or update the metadata of the provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Create or update the metadata of the provisioning service. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the provisioning service metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/certificates
endpoints.description: Get all the certificates tied to the provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/certificates/{certificateName}
endpoints.description: Get the certificate from the provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: Upload the certificate to the provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Add new certificate or update an existing certificate.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/certificates/{certificateName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/certificates/{certificateName}/generateVerificationCode
endpoints.description: Generate verification code for Proof of Possession.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/certificates/{certificateName}/verify
endpoints.description: Verifies certificate for the provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: Get a shared access policy by name from a provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Get a shared access policy by name from a provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{KEYNAME}} with a real keyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: Get the security metadata for a provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Get the security metadata for a provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Devices/provisioningServices/{provisioningServiceName}/operationresults/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Gets the status of a long running operation, such as create, update or delete a provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.

endpoints.name: Get the list of valid SKUs for a provisioning service.
endpoints.description: Get the list of valid SKUs for a provisioning service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{PROVISIONINGSERVICENAME}} with a real provisioningservicename.
